# Kastriot Tanaj — SEO Consultant New York

> New York SEO consultant helping NYC businesses rank #1 on Google. AI-powered SEO strategies, automation workflows, and proven results across Europe and the USA.

## About

Kastriot Tanaj is an SEO consultant with 4+ years of experience and 100+ clients served. Starting in Switzerland in 2021, he quickly mastered SEO and delivered page 1 rankings for companies like STS Company. By 2023, he had expanded across Europe — working with clients in Germany (AT BAU GmbH, Cologne), the Netherlands (Faralda Crane Hotel, Amsterdam), and Kosovo. In 2024, he integrated AI-powered tools into SEO workflows, combining marketing expertise with automation. Now he is bringing battle-tested European SEO expertise to the most competitive market in the world — New York City.

## Services

### SEO Strategy & Consulting
Comprehensive SEO audits, competitive analysis, and custom roadmaps tailored to your business goals. Identifies the highest-impact opportunities to get you ranking in New York and beyond.

### AI-Powered Content Systems
Scalable content pipelines using AI to produce high-ranking, engaging content. From blog posts to landing pages, builds systems that generate traffic-driving content at speed.

### Automation Workflows
Save hours every week with automated SEO reporting, rank tracking, and marketing workflows. Custom automations that keep your SEO machine running on autopilot.

### 1-on-1 SEO Coaching
Personalized coaching for founders, marketers, and in-house teams who want to build SEO expertise. Learn the strategies and tools the pros use.

## Portfolio

Real SEO results: page 1 rankings for clients across Europe and New York. Case studies from STS Company (Switzerland), Faralda Crane Hotel (Amsterdam), AT BAU GmbH (Cologne), and more. Full case studies available at https://kastriottanaj.com/portfolio.

## Blog

Expert SEO tips, AI automation insights, and digital marketing strategies. Actionable advice for ranking higher in New York and beyond. Read at https://kastriottanaj.com/blog.

## Contact

Get in touch for a free SEO consultation:
- Website: https://kastriottanaj.com/contact
- Location: New York City (serving businesses in NYC and worldwide)
